top_signals.title: China is building launch pads near its nuclear missile silos
top_signals.summary: China’s nuclear missiles can reach any U.S. city. Now, satellite images show Beijing is building a sprawling web of military sites near its nuclear silos.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
